feed.title: Azure｜企業テックブログRSS
feed.subtitle: Azureセクションのブログ更新をまとめたRSSフィード

entry.title: The Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent’s Playbook: A Practical Livestream Series for Building Better Agents | Microsoft for Developers
entry.summary: Building on Microsoft 365 Copilot? Here’s your playbook. Declarative agents are quickly becoming one of the most exciting ways to extend Microsoft 365 Copilot and bring organizational knowledge, workf
entry.content: Building on Microsoft 365 Copilot? Here’s your playbook. Declarative agents are quickly becoming one of the most exciting ways to extend Microsoft 365 Copilot and bring organizational knowledge, workflows, and tools directly into the flow of work. But as agent capabilities grow, so does the need for practical guidance: How do you build agents that […]The post The Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent’s Playbook: A Practical Livestream Series for Building Better Agents appeared first on Microsoft for Devel

entry.title: AT&amp;T and Microsoft scale trillion-token workloads with Microsoft Foundry and AMD | Microsoft Azure Blog
entry.summary: AT&amp;T processed approximately one trillion tokens while developing OTel2.0 using Microsoft Foundry Managed Compute, open AI models, and AMD and NVIDIA GPU infrastructure. Discover how flexible model ch
entry.content: AT&amp;T processed approximately one trillion tokens while developing OTel2.0 using Microsoft Foundry Managed Compute, open AI models, and AMD and NVIDIA GPU infrastructure. Discover how flexible model choice and scalable infrastructure are enabling production-scale telecom AI.The post AT&amp;T and Microsoft scale trillion-token workloads with Microsoft Foundry and AMD appeared first on Microsoft Azure Blog.

entry.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure DDoS Protection custom policy | Azure service updates
entry.summary: Azure DDoS Protection custom policyis now in public preview. This capability provides per-resource control overDDoS mitigation thresholds for protected Standard Load Balancer frontend IPconfigurations
entry.content: Azure DDoS Protection custom policyis now in public preview. This capability provides per-resource control overDDoS mitigation thresholds for protected Standard Load Balancer frontend IPconfigurations. Customers can configure fixedinbound detection th

entry.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Standard service endpoint | Azure service updates
entry.summary: Standard service endpoint is now available in public preview, introducing a scalable and secure way to connect IaaS workloads to Azure PaaS services under the Private Link family. This enhanced capabi
entry.content: Standard service endpoint is now available in public preview, introducing a scalable and secure way to connect IaaS workloads to Azure PaaS services under the Private Link family. This enhanced capability overcomes the scale and management limitations of

entry.title: How to test agent experience changes without shipping them | Microsoft for Developers
entry.summary: Most changes you think will improve AI agent behavior won't. We tested a dozen hypotheses on a real project upgrade scenario and the majority failed. Learn how to emulate documentation, API, and MCP s
entry.content: Most changes you think will improve AI agent behavior won't. We tested a dozen hypotheses on a real project upgrade scenario and the majority failed. Learn how to emulate documentation, API, and MCP server changes locally so you can validate what works before shipping anything to production.The post How to test agent experience changes without shipping them appeared first on Microsoft for Developers.

entry.title: [In preview] Public Preview: Protect sensitive generative AI telemetry in Application Insights and Microsoft Foundry | Azure service updates
entry.summary: Azure Monitor Application Insights now stores generative AIcontent in a dedicated GenAIContent table (AppGenAIContent in LogAnalytics), making it possible to apply newlyavailable access controls to se
entry.content: Azure Monitor Application Insights now stores generative AIcontent in a dedicated GenAIContent table (AppGenAIContent in LogAnalytics), making it possible to apply newlyavailable access controls to sensitive AI telemetry. Because ApplicationInsights p

entry.title: [Launched] Generally Available: IPv6 support for Azure VPN Gateway | Azure service updates
entry.summary: IPv6 support for Azure VPN Gateway enables customers to run IPv6 inner traffic through VPN tunnels in a dual‑stack configuration. IPv6 is supported on all production SKU gateways that use standard pub
entry.content: IPv6 support for Azure VPN Gateway enables customers to run IPv6 inner traffic through VPN tunnels in a dual‑stack configuration. IPv6 is supported on all production SKU gateways that use standard public IPs.IPv6 inner traffic can be configured for both n

entry.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Functions support for Python 3.14 | Azure service updates
entry.summary: You can now develop functions using Python 3.14 locally anddeploy them to Azure Functions plans on Linux. Upgrade your apps to Python 3.14 to take advantageof enhanced security, a longer support windo
entry.content: You can now develop functions using Python 3.14 locally anddeploy them to Azure Functions plans on Linux. Upgrade your apps to Python 3.14 to take advantageof enhanced security, a longer support window, and continued compatibility withthe Azure Functio

entry.title: [Launched] Public Preview: Azure Functions Support for PowerShell 7.6 | Azure service updates
entry.summary: Azure Functions support for PowerShell 7.6 is now available in preview. You can now develop apps using PowerShell 7.6 locally and deploy them to Azure Functions plans. Learn more: What'snew in PowerSh
entry.content: Azure Functions support for PowerShell 7.6 is now available in preview. You can now develop apps using PowerShell 7.6 locally and deploy them to Azure Functions plans. Learn more: What'snew in PowerShell 7.6 Azure Functions PowerShell versions and their

entry.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Microsoft Defender security assessments for Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server | Azure service updates
entry.summary: Microsoft Defender Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) assessments for Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server are now generally available. You can use assessments to continuously evaluate
entry.content: Microsoft Defender Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) assessments for Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server are now generally available. You can use assessments to continuously evaluate the security posture of your Azure PostgreSQL flexible

entry.title: [Launched] Generally Available: Encryption in Transit for Azure Files NFS Shares in Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) | Azure service updates
entry.summary: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) now generally supports Encryption in Transit (EiT) for Azure Files NFS v4.1 volumes through the Azure File CSI driver. With EiT enabled, data transferred between AKS wor
entry.content: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) now generally supports Encryption in Transit (EiT) for Azure Files NFS v4.1 volumes through the Azure File CSI driver. With EiT enabled, data transferred between AKS workloads and Azure Files NFS shares is encrypted using TL

entry.title: How to test agent skills without hitting real APIs | Microsoft for Developers
entry.summary: Your agent skill calls an API. The moment you start evaluating it, every run either costs money or mutates production data. Learn how to mock APIs transparently so you can run evals without changing y
entry.content: Your agent skill calls an API. The moment you start evaluating it, every run either costs money or mutates production data. Learn how to mock APIs transparently so you can run evals without changing your skill or hitting real endpoints.The post How to test agent skills without hitting real APIs appeared first on Microsoft for Developers.
